modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble activating Amira software on Windows machine

full_description_text:  
User is trying to activate Amira software. They are on a Windows computer. The activation process is not working. They seem confused about what to do next.
short_description: Trouble activating Amira software on Windows machine
description: User is trying to activate Amira software. They are on a Windows computer. The activation process is not working. They seem confused about what to do next.
